productDisplayName: Playboy Men Hollywood Fragrance Gift Set
description: Style NoteThis Hollywood set from playboy is perfect as a gift or for a little self indulgence. Product DetailsCologne and body spray setTop notes are are mandarin and bergamot, along with aromatic accords of thyme and elemi, the heart consists of calming lavender with jasmine, rosewood and cedar with a base of vetiver, musk, amber, vanilla and sandalwoodCautionDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying in eyesSizeCologne: 100 mlBody Spray: 150 ml
